function(x0: G, x1: Real) { not s ⊂ norm_closed_ball(x0, x1) }(x, 0)
not norm_open_ball(x, r) ⊂ b
norm_open_ball(x, r) ⊂ b
not norm_is_bounded[G](norm_closed_ball(x, r))
not u ⊂ b or not norm_is_bounded[G](b)
not u ⊂ b
norm_is_bounded[G](u)

goal: norm_distance(x + z, y + z) = (x + z - (y + z)).norm
proof: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 - x1).norm = norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) }[G](x + z, y + z)
function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 - x1).norm = norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) }[G](x, y)

goal: x + z - (y + z) = x + z + -(y + z)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[G](x + z, y + z)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[G](x, z, -z + -y)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[G](z, -z, -y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[G](z)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[G](-y)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[G](x, y)
(x + z - (y + z)).norm = norm_distance(x, y)
(x + z - (y + z)).norm != norm_distance(x, y)

goal: norm_open_ball(x + z, r).contains(y + z) = norm_distance(y + z, x + z) < r
proof: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: Real) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) < x2 = x0 ∈ norm_open_ball[T0](x1, x2) }[G](y + z, x + z, r)
function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: Real) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) < x2 = x0 ∈ norm_open_ball[T0](x1, x2) }[G](y, x, r)

goal: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) = norm_distance(y, x)

proof: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) < r = y ∈ norm_open_ball(x, r)
norm_distance(y + z, x + z) < r != y ∈ norm_open_ball(x, r)

goal: norm_closed_ball(x + z, r).contains(y + z) = norm_distance(y + z, x + z) <= r
proof: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: Real, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ norm_closed_ball[T0](x0, x1) = norm_distance[T0](x2, x0) <= x1 }[G](x + z, r, y + z)
function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: Real, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ norm_closed_ball[T0](x0, x1) = norm_distance[T0](x2, x0) <= x1 }[G](x, r, y)

goal: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) = norm_distance(y, x)

proof: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) <= r = y ∈ norm_closed_ball(x, r)
norm_distance(y + z, x + z) <= r != y ∈ norm_closed_ball(x, r)
